entry_fields.issue_id: Beads issue ID this reservation belongs to
entry_fields.renew_rule: Only active, unexpired reservations for the same issue and actor can be renewed

rules: profiles.json reservation_policy is canonical for when a current reservation is required
beo-plan creates reservation when the selected profile or risk context requires it
beo-validate always checks active reservations for conflicts and requires a current reservation only when profile policy requires it
reservation actor must match the Beads claim actor via BEO_ACTOR / BR_ACTOR
beo-execute renews active reservations before long-running mutation or verification
Expired reservations are auto-released on next check
Reservations use same path_tokens_overlap() logic as active_scope_conflicts()
